sections.title: Writing Task 1
sections.instructions: You should spend about 20 minutes on this task.

prompt.text: The diagram below shows how a biofuel called ethanol is produced. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

visuals.caption: Biofuel production: how ethanol is made

sections.title: Writing Task 2
sections.instructions: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task.

prompt.text: It is important for everyone, including young people, to save money for their future. To what extent do you agree or disagree with this statement? Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.
